page_metadata.biotools__summary: PrecisionProDB (Precision protein database) is a tool improving the proteomics performance for precision medicine. PrecisionProDB is a Python package for proteogenomics, which can generate a customized protein database for peptide search in mass spectrometry.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PrecisionProDB (Precision protein database) is a tool improving the proteomics performance for precision medicine. PrecisionProDB is a Python package for proteogenomics, which can generate a customized protein database for peptide search in mass spectrometry.
